message:
Command `# Let's check the OpenROAD source for check_antennas to see if there's a way to disable PSM
# First check if OpenROAD has a --suppress or --no-check-psm option
echo "antenna_repair -help 2>/dev/null; check_antennas -verbose 2>/dev/null" | \
    /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad -no_splash -exit 2>&1 | grep -i "help\|Usage\|flag\|option" | head -10 || true

echo "---REAL FIX: We need to recover GRT output and create state_out.json---"
# The GRT completed (0 overflow, 107776 nets, guide written).
# We need to manually run write_views and create state_out.json.
# 
# Get the ODB from step 29 (input to GRT)
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/29-openroad-detailedplacement/*.odb 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
